Name: SWORD_ARTS_PARAM_ST
Description: All Action Ids for Weapon Arts

Fields.Name: Sword Arts Type
Fields.Description: Offset for TAE animation. 0 is a600. To pass to the behavior script to determine which swashbuckler

Fields.Name: Arts Speed Type
Fields.Description: Which cancellation timing do you see? 0: Normal (left hand attack) / 1: Early / 2: Slow

Fields.Name: Reference Status Type
Fields.Description: Which system of arts points to refer to

Fields.Name: Is Right-hand Arts Reference
Fields.Description: When set to the arts of the left-handed weapon, the arts of the right-handed weapon are displayed in FE. Assumed to be used for weapon maneuvers etc.

Fields.Name: Is Greyout Left-hand
Fields.Description: Whether to gray out when displaying the arts name of the left hand (one-handed)

Fields.Name: Is Greyout Right-hand
Fields.Description: Whether to gray out when displaying the arts name of the right hand (one-handed)

Fields.Name: Is Greyout Both-hand
Fields.Description: Whether to gray out when displaying the arts name of both hands

Fields.Name: Arts Points - L1
Fields.Description: Points to spend when putting out arts by L1

Fields.Name: Arts Points - L2
Fields.Description: Points to spend when putting out arts by L2

Fields.Name: Arts Points - R1
Fields.Description: Points to spend when putting out arts by R1

Fields.Name: Arts Points - R2
Fields.Description: Points to spend when putting out arts by R2

Fields.Name: FP Consumption - L1
Fields.Description: MP consumed when issuing arts by L1

Fields.Name: FP Consumption - L2
Fields.Description: MP consumed when issuing arts by L2

Fields.Name: FP Consumption - R1
Fields.Description: MP consumed when issuing arts by R1

Fields.Name: FP Consumption - R2
Fields.Description: MP consumed when issuing arts by R2

Fields.Name: Shield Icon Type
Fields.Description: If you do not overwrite it, the icon will be displayed based on the swashbuckler ID of the weapon para.
